known_limitations: Minimal reproducer of Harvest Finance read-only reentrancy via Curve Y pool
Citation: https://rekt.news/harvest-finance-rekt/ -- Harvest Finance loses $34M to flash-loan + Curve pool price manipulation (Oct 18 2020)
Vulnerable pattern: Curve pool price read AFTER ERC20 transfer callback -- stale during reentrancy
Critical action gated by state: deposit share calculation based on stale pool price
